calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Continued To Apr-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 17, 2005 is admitted to probate. Terence Nathan Lee and Karen Lorraine Lee are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required as it is waived by the will. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 5, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
